parameters.query:
SELECT 'substack_posts' AS source_table, id, title, cleaned_content FROM m_staging.substack_posts WHERE embedding IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'notion_pages' AS source_table, id, title, cleaned_content FROM m_staging.notion_pages WHERE embedding IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'linkedin_posts' AS source_table, id, '' AS title, cleaned_content FROM m_staging.linkedin_posts WHERE embedding IS NULL;
